"""Agent-editable browser helpers.

input.new_string:
"""Agent-editable browser helpers.

Add task-specific browser primitives here. Core helpers from browser_harness.helpers
load this file when BH_AGENT_WORKSPACE points at this directory, or when this
repo's default agent-workspace exists.
"""


def page_title_contains(text):
    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("src/browser_harness/helpers.py")
text = p.read_text()
p.write_text(text + "\n\ndef opaque_task_title_has(text):\n    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()\n")
PY

agent_output: Added `page_title_contains(text)` in `agent-workspace/agent_helpers.py`. It compares case-insensitively against the current page title returned by `page_info()`.
